# Vexa

> Open-source, self-hosted meeting bot & transcription API (Apache-2.0). A bot joins
> Google Meet / Microsoft Teams / Zoom calls and streams speaker-attributed transcripts
> in real time through an API you host; sandboxed agents then compile meetings into a
> git-backed Markdown knowledge workspace (Karpathy LLM-Wiki pattern). Air-gap-ready:
> bring your own LLM and self-host the GPU transcription unit. Runs on Docker Compose,
> a single container (lite), or Kubernetes via Helm.

## Start here
- [README](README.md): what Vexa is, quickstart, deployment options, API tables, honest status
- [Docs site source](docs/docs/): published at https://docs.vexa.ai
- [Architecture constitution](docs/docs/governance/architecture.mdx): principles P1–P23 + the CI gates enforcing them
- [Delivery constitution](docs/docs/governance/delivery.mdx): D0–D17 — how work is prepared, proven, and shipped (roadmap, issues, PRs, release)
- [Machine-readable architecture](architecture.calm.json): FINOS CALM model of every service and data flow
- [ADRs](docs/adr/): decision records

## Deploy
- [Root Makefile](Makefile): `make all` (compose) · `make bot` (build bot image, required) · `make lite`
- [Compose stack](deploy/compose/): the full self-host stack
- [Helm chart](deploy/helm/): Kubernetes/OpenShift, a Pod per bot/agent dispatch
- [Self-hosted transcription](deploy/transcription/): GPU faster-whisper unit for air-gapped setups

## Contribute (remote agents: this file is your entrypoint)
- **The loop for a remote agent:** fetch the roadmap (one GraphQL call, see the contributing page) → research this repo → **dump findings as GitHub issues** (https://github.com/Vexa-ai/vexa/issues/new/choose — every report enters a 3-day triage SLA, `state: incoming`) → to pick up work, clone and read [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md).
- [Contributing: how delivery works](docs/docs/roadmap/contributing.mdx): the roadmap board, issue state machine, prepared-issue merge promise, value signing — includes the one-call GraphQL roadmap fetch for agents
- Roadmap board: https://github.com/orgs/Vexa-ai/projects/2 (fields: Lane = who feels the value · Human bar = the validation act · Setup = infra floor · Milestone = version)
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): the post-clone contributor contract — your claimed issue is your PRD; claim + Discord hello + heartbeat
- [DELIVERY-PREPARE.md](docs/docs/governance/delivery-prepare.mdx) · [DELIVERY-TAKE.md](docs/docs/governance/delivery-take.mdx): the two maintainer protocols (queue item → prepared issue · delivered PR → verdict)

## Evaluate
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): vulnerability reporting
- [security-insights.yml](security-insights.yml): OpenSSF Security Insights manifest
- [license-exceptions.json](license-exceptions.json): FINOS license gating
- [LICENSE](LICENSE): Apache-2.0
